title: Process Engineer Vacancy at ACC Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at ACC Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at ACC Limited are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Nashik. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About ACC Limited:
ACC Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ACC Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
